---
format:
  amaquarto-docx: default
  amaquarto-pdf:
    pdf-format: manuscript
    keep-tex: false
# NOTE: The title page is a SEPARATE file from the main document.
# It contains identifying information that must be excluded from
# the main document to facilitate double-anonymized peer review.
# Do NOT include 'title:' or 'abstract:' in this YAML header;
# the title page content is placed directly in the body below.
---

```{=latex}
\thispagestyle{empty}\pagestyle{empty}
```

::: {.center}
**Your Manuscript Title Here**
:::

\ 

::: {.noindent}
First Author Full Name, Title, Institution, Country, email\@example.com

Second Author Full Name, Title, Institution, Country, email\@example.com

Third Author Full Name, Title, Institution, Country, email\@example.com

\ 

**Corresponding author:** First Author Full Name, Mailing Address, Phone Number, email\@example.com

\ 

**Author notes:** Include any relevant author notes here.

\ 

**Acknowledgments:** The authors thank [names] for their helpful comments and suggestions.
:::

\ 

# Statements and Declarations

::: {.noindent}

## Ethical Considerations

Add your ethics approval statements here (for more information and examples, see Sage's [publication ethics and research integrity policies page](https://www.sagepub.com/ethical-statements-msg)).

## Consent to Participate

Add any participant consent information here.

## Declaration of Conflicting Interest

The author(s) declared no potential conflicts of interest with respect to the research, authorship, and/or publication of this article.

<!-- If there IS a conflict, replace the above with a description of the conflict(s). -->

## Funding

The author(s) received no financial support for the research, authorship, and/or publication of this article.

<!-- If funding WAS received, replace the above with:
The author(s) disclosed receipt of the following financial support for the
research, authorship, and/or publication of this article: This work was
supported by [funding agency] [grant number xxx]. -->

## Data Availability

Add your data availability statement here (for more information and examples, see [AMA's data availability statements page](https://www.ama.org/research-transparency-policy/data-availability-statements/)).

:::
